name: form-tanstack-demo

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## form-tanstack-demo
**Type:** registry:example
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** @tanstack/react-form, zod

visual_summary: Form Tanstack Demo is a reusable form component built with Tanstack, providing developers with a customizable, accessibility-conformant solution for complex form inputs, ideal for web applications requiring sophisticated data collection and validation. This component can be used to build dynamic and user-centric forms across various use cases. It is specifically designed for applications integrating with the powerful data management capabilities of Tanstack.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: form-tanstack-demo
Description: Form Tanstack Demo is a reusable form component built with Tanstack, providing developers with a customizable, accessibility-conformant solution for complex form inputs, ideal for web applications requiring sophisticated data collection and validation. This component can be used to build dynamic and user-centric forms across various use cases. It is specifically designed for applications integrating with the powerful data management capabilities of Tanstack.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: form, tanstack, customizable, accessibility

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
